channel.title: APIpulse Blog — AI API Pricing & Cost Optimization
channel.description: Expert guides on AI API pricing, cost optimization, and model comparisons. Compare OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral, Cohere, DeepSeek, and more.

item.title: AI API Cost Optimization Checklist: 15 Ways to Cut Your LLM Bill
item.description: Actionable checklist to reduce AI API costs by 40-70%. Model selection, caching, prompt optimization, batching, and monitoring strategies with real savings examples.

item.title: GPT-5 vs Claude 4 vs Gemini 3.1 Pro: 2026 API Pricing Comparison
item.description: GPT-5 ($1.25/$10) vs Claude Sonnet 4.6 ($3/$15) vs Gemini 3.1 Pro ($2/$12) — the definitive 3-way flagship comparison. Cost breakdowns for chatbots, code gen, RAG, and agents. Category winners and multi-model strategy.

item.title: Best AI APIs for Translation 2026
item.description: Compare AI APIs for translation. Real cost breakdowns for Gemini Flash, GPT-5 Mini, DeepSeek V4 Flash, and Mistral Small — including monthly costs for 1K to 100K documents. Language coverage comparison across 7 language families.

item.title: GPT-5.5 vs Gemini 3.1 Pro: Premium Model Showdown (May 2026)
item.description: GPT-5.5 ($5/$30) vs Gemini 3.1 Pro ($2/$12) — two premium models, 60% price gap. Same 1M context, very different cost. Full cost breakdowns for chatbots, code generation, and document analysis. Gemini saves $270-$405/month.

item.title: Llama 4 Scout vs Maverick: Which Open-Source Model Should You Use?
item.description: Llama 4 Scout ($0.11/$0.34, 10M context) vs Maverick ($0.20/$0.60, 1M context) — Meta's two open-source LLMs compared. Scout is 45% cheaper with 10x context. Maverick has 3.7x more knowledge. Full cost breakdowns for chatbots, document processing, and classification.

item.title: State of LLM Pricing Q2 2026: 33 Models, 10 Providers, One Clear Winner
item.description: Comprehensive Q2 2026 LLM pricing analysis. GPT-4o dropped 67%, Grok 3 jumped 10x, budget models now under $0.10/1M tokens. Full data on 33 models across 10 providers with decision framework.

item.title: 2026 Flagship LLM API Cost Comparison: GPT-5.5 vs Claude Opus 4.7 vs Gemini 3.1 Pro
item.description: GPT-5.5 ($5/$30) vs Claude Opus 4.7 ($5/$25) vs Gemini 3.1 Pro ($2/$12) vs DeepSeek V4 Pro ($0.44/$0.87). DeepSeek is 91% cheaper on output. Full cost breakdowns for coding, RAG, chatbots, and content generation.

item.title: AI API Fine-Tuning Costs in 2026: Who's Actually Worth It?
item.description: Fine-tuning costs range from $0.003 to $25 per million training tokens. Compare OpenAI, Google, Mistral, and open-source models. Training vs inference pricing, break-even analysis, and when fine-tuning beats prompt engineering.

item.title: DeepSeek V4 Pro vs Gemini 3.1 Pro: Budget vs Mid-Tier AI API
item.description: DeepSeek V4 Pro ($0.44/$0.87 per 1M tokens) vs Gemini 3.1 Pro ($2/$12) — DeepSeek is 78% cheaper on input and 93% cheaper on output. Real cost breakdowns for coding, RAG, chatbots, and enterprise workloads.

item.title: Claude Haiku 4.5 vs GPT-5 Mini: Budget AI API Pricing Compared
item.description: Claude Haiku 4.5 ($1/$5 per 1M tokens) vs GPT-5 Mini ($0.25/$2) — GPT-5 Mini is 75% cheaper on input. Real cost breakdowns for chatbots, coding, RAG, and high-volume workloads.

item.title: Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite vs DeepSeek V4 Flash: The Cheapest AI APIs in 2026
item.description: Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite ($0.075/$0.30) vs DeepSeek V4 Flash ($0.14/$0.28) — which is actually cheaper? Real cost breakdowns for chatbots, RAG, code gen, and high-volume workloads.

item.title: Best AI APIs for Customer Support Chatbots 2026
item.description: Real cost breakdowns for GPT-5 Mini, Gemini Flash, Claude Haiku, and DeepSeek — including monthly costs for 1K, 10K, and 100K conversations. Multi-model routing strategy included.

item.title: Build a Cost-Optimized AI Stack: The Complete 2026 Guide
item.description: Build a production AI stack for under $30/month. Exact model recommendations for embedding, retrieval, generation, and monitoring — with real cost math across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and DeepSeek.

item.title: AI API Rate Limits Compared: 2026 Guide to RPM, TPM, and Quotas
item.description: Compare AI API rate limits across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, Mistral, and more. RPM, TPM, and RPD limits for every major model — plus strategies to handle 429 errors.

item.title: DeepSeek V4 Pro vs GPT-5 Mini: Budget King Showdown
item.description: DeepSeek V4 Pro ($0.44/$0.87, 1M context) vs GPT-5 Mini ($0.25/$2.00, 272K): Full cost breakdown, monthly scenarios, and decision framework for the two most popular budget APIs.

item.title: Claude Opus 4.7 vs GPT-5: Premium Power at 4x the Price
item.description: Claude Opus 4.7 ($5/$25) vs GPT-5 ($1.25/$10): Opus has 1M context and top-tier reasoning, but costs 4x more. Full pricing, cost per request, monthly scenarios, and when each justifies the premium.

item.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6 vs Gemini 3.1 Pro: Two 1M Context Models Compared
item.description: Claude Sonnet 4.6 ($3/$15) vs Gemini 3.1 Pro ($2/$12): both have 1M context, but Gemini is 20-33% cheaper on standard pricing. Batch API changes the math.

item.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6 vs GPT-5.5: Same Context, Half the Price
item.description: Claude Sonnet 4.6 ($3/$15) vs GPT-5.5 ($5/$30): same 1M context window, but Sonnet is 40-50% cheaper. Full pricing breakdown, monthly costs, and when each model wins.

item.title: Grok 3 vs Claude 4 Sonnet: Same Price, Different Worlds
item.description: Grok 3 ($3/$15) vs Claude 4 Sonnet ($3/$15): same price, radically different strengths. Real-time X data vs 200K context and batch API at 50% off.

item.title: GPT-5 Mini vs Claude 4 Haiku: Budget API Showdown 2026
item.description: GPT-5 Mini ($0.25/$2.00) vs Claude 4 Haiku ($1.00/$5.00): full cost comparison with real workload breakdowns. GPT-5 Mini 57-69% cheaper but Haiku wins on quality and tool use.

item.title: Claude 4 Sonnet vs Gemini 3 Pro: The Mid-Tier API Showdown 2026
item.description: Claude 4 Sonnet ($3/$15) vs Gemini 3 Pro ($2/$12): pricing, context windows (200K vs 1M), quality, and real cost breakdowns. Gemini 22-29% cheaper but Claude batch API reverses the math.

item.title: GPT-5 Mini API Cost Breakdown: Complete Pricing Guide 2026
item.description: GPT-5 Mini at $0.25/$2.00: full cost breakdown per request, per 1K requests, and monthly estimates across 5 workloads. Compare with Haiku, Gemini Flash, and DeepSeek.

item.title: Llama 4 Scout vs DeepSeek V4 Flash: Ultra-Budget API Showdown 2026
item.description: Llama 4 Scout ($0.11/$0.34) vs DeepSeek V4 Flash ($0.14/$0.28) — two ultra-budget APIs with massive context windows. Full cost breakdown, quality comparison, and when to pick each one.

item.title: Gemini 3 Pro vs GPT-5: Google vs OpenAI Flagship Comparison 2026
item.description: Gemini 3 Pro ($2.00/$12.00) vs GPT-5 ($1.25/$10.00): pricing, 1M vs 272K context, multimodal capabilities, and real cost breakdowns for production workloads.

item.title: GPT-5 vs Claude 4 Sonnet: Flagship AI Model Comparison 2026
item.description: GPT-5 ($1.25/$10.00) vs Claude 4 Sonnet ($3.00/$15.00): pricing, context windows, quality, and real cost breakdowns for production workloads. Save 36-54% with the right model choice.

item.title: GPT-4o mini vs Claude Haiku: Cost Per Request Showdown
item.description: GPT-4o mini at $0.00033/request vs Claude Haiku 4.5 at $0.0025/request — a 7.6x cost difference. Compare real per-request costs across chat, code gen, and doc analysis workloads.

item.title: AI API Cost Per Request: The Metric Developers Actually Need
item.description: Stop thinking in tokens. Learn how to calculate AI API cost per request, compare models by cost-per-call, and budget your LLM usage like a real engineering expense.

item.title: Claude 4 Sonnet vs DeepSeek V4 Pro: Pricing, Context & Performance Compared
item.description: DeepSeek V4 Pro at $0.44 vs Claude Sonnet 4.6 at $3.00 input. Full comparison of pricing, context, speed, and quality for every use case.

item.title: The Complete Guide to AI API Token Pricing: How to Read, Compare, and Optimize
item.description: Master AI API token pricing: understand input vs output costs, pricing tiers, hidden fees, and optimization strategies across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, and Mistral.

item.title: AI API Pricing for Startups: How to Plan Your First $100 on AI APIs
item.description: Practical AI API pricing guide for startups. Real cost breakdowns, budget tiers, and a step-by-step framework for spending your first $100 on AI APIs without wasting a cent.

item.title: Building a Startup on $100 — Week 3 Update
item.description: Three weeks into a 12-week challenge: build a real startup with only $100. 152 pages, 101 blog posts, 33 AI models tracked. Real numbers, real lessons.

item.title: How to Set Up AI API Cost Alerts: Never Get Surprise Bills Again
item.description: Set up AI API cost alerts that catch surprise bills before they happen. Monitor spending across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and DeepSeek with real-time budget limits and notifications.

item.title: LLM API Error Handling and Retry Strategies: Avoid Wasting Money on Failed Requests
item.description: Master LLM API error handling with retry strategies, exponential backoff, and cost-aware error management. Reduce wasted spend on failed requests across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and more.

item.title: AI API Cost Monitoring: How to Track, Predict, and Control Your LLM Spending
item.description: Set up AI API cost monitoring that catches surprise bills before they happen. Track usage, predict spending, set alerts, and optimize across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and DeepSeek.

item.title: AI API Context Windows in 2026: Complete Guide to Long Context Models
item.description: Compare context windows across 33 AI models in 2026. From 128K to 10M tokens — which models support long context, what it costs, and when you need it.

item.title: 7 AI API Pricing Mistakes That Cost Developers Thousands
item.description: Avoid these 7 common AI API pricing mistakes. Real examples of developers overpaying by 3-10x on OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google APIs. Includes cost comparisons and fix strategies.

item.title: GPT-oss vs Llama 4: Open-Source LLM API Showdown 2026
item.description: GPT-oss ($0.08-$0.15) vs Llama 4 ($0.11-$0.20): Open-source LLM API comparison. Scout's 10M context window vs GPT-oss's lower input pricing. Full cost breakdown.

item.title: Best AI API for Summarization 2026: Quality vs Cost
item.description: Best AI APIs for text summarization ranked. Gemini Flash ($0.10/$0.40) is best value, DeepSeek ($0.14/$0.28) cheapest output, Claude Haiku best for nuanced content. Full comparison.

item.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6 vs GPT-5: Complete Pricing & Performance Comparison (May 2026)
item.description: Claude Sonnet 4.6 ($3/$15) vs GPT-5 ($1.25/$10): GPT-5 costs 58% less but Sonnet 4.6 offers 3.7x more context. Full comparison with cost scenarios.

item.description: Ranked: best AI APIs for production by reliability, cost, context, and speed. GPT-5, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, DeepSeek V4 compared with real cost scenarios.

item.description: 7 OpenAI alternatives ranked by cost. DeepSeek V4 Flash saves 89%, Gemini Flash Lite saves 94%, Llama 4 saves 91%. Full comparison with quality analysis.

item.description: GPT-5 ($1.25/$10) vs Gemini 3.1 Pro ($2/$12): GPT-5 costs 37% less but Gemini offers 3.7x more context. Full breakdown with cost scenarios.

item.description: The cheapest GPT-5 API options: GPT-oss 20B at $0.08, GPT-5 mini at $0.25. Full breakdown of all 8 models with monthly cost scenarios. Save up to 94%.

item.description: Complete Q2 2026 LLM API pricing report. Compare all 33 models across 10 providers, see what changed since Q1, and find the cheapest option for your use case.

item.title: The True Cost of RAG: LLM Pricing for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
item.description: Break down the real cost of RAG pipelines in 2026. Compare embedding, retrieval, and generation costs across OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google models.

item.title: How to Build a RAG Pipeline on a Budget
item.description: Build a production-ready RAG pipeline without breaking the bank. Compare budget, mid-range, and production stacks with full cost breakdowns for embedding, retrieval, and generation.

item.title: AI API Rate Limits Compared: Every Provider's Limits in 2026
item.description: Compare rate limits across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, xAI, Mistral, Cohere, AI21, Together.ai, and Moonshot. Learn how to handle rate limiting, build retry logic, and optimize your API usage.

item.title: How to Reduce Your AI API Costs by 40% (Without Losing Quality)
item.description: Practical strategies for cutting LLM API costs: model selection, prompt optimization, caching, batching, and smart routing.

item.title: How to Switch LLM Providers Without Breaking Your App
item.description: A practical guide to migrating between LLM API providers. Avoid common pitfalls, handle API differences, and cut costs by switching to cheaper models.

item.title: xAI Grok API Pricing Guide 2026: Grok 3 vs Grok 3 Mini
item.description: xAI Grok API pricing breakdown: Grok 3 ($3.00/$15.00 per 1M tokens) and Grok 3 Mini ($0.30/$0.50). Compare with OpenAI, Anthropic, and DeepSeek.

item.title: xAI Grok vs GPT-4o: Is Grok Worth It?
item.description: Grok vs GPT-4o: A detailed comparison of pricing, context windows, performance, and real-world use cases to help you decide if xAI Grok is worth switching from OpenAI.

item.title: How to Choose Between Claude Sonnet and GPT-4o in 2026
item.description: Claude Sonnet vs GPT-4o: A practical decision guide for developers. Compare pricing, quality, speed, and real-world use cases to pick the right model for your project.

item.title: How to Save 50% on OpenAI API Costs in 2026
item.description: Proven strategies to cut your OpenAI API bill in half. Learn how to reduce GPT API costs with model switching, prompt optimization, batching, and caching.

item.title: AI API Pricing for RAG: Complete Cost Breakdown 2026
item.description: Complete 2026 cost breakdown of RAG pipelines: embedding, vector search, and generation pricing across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, and Llama. Updated April 2026.

item.title: GPT-4o mini vs DeepSeek V4 Flash: Budget Champion Showdown (2026)
item.description: GPT-4o mini ($0.15/$0.60) vs DeepSeek V4 Flash ($0.14/$0.28): which budget model gives you more for your money? Cost comparison, quality analysis, and use case breakdowns.

item.title: How to Choose the Right Embedding Model for RAG (2026)
item.description: Choose the best embedding model for your RAG pipeline. Compare OpenAI, Cohere, Google, and Llama embeddings on cost, quality, dimensions, and performance.

item.title: DeepSeek vs OpenAI: The Budget Alternative
item.description: DeepSeek vs OpenAI: A complete pricing and performance comparison of DeepSeek V4, V3 vs GPT-4o, GPT-5, and GPT-4o mini. Find out which AI API delivers the best value for your use case.

item.title: AI API Cost Calculator: How to Plan Your AI Budget
item.description: AI API cost calculator: Learn how to plan your AI budget with APIpulse. Step-by-step guide to estimating monthly costs, comparing models, and staying within budget.

item.title: Claude 4 Opus vs GPT-5.5: Premium Model Showdown (2026)
item.description: Claude 4 Opus ($15/$75) vs GPT-5.5 ($5/$30): which premium model justifies the price? Detailed pricing, use case costs, and decision framework.

item.title: The Complete Guide to AI API Batch Processing
item.description: Complete guide to AI API batch processing: compare batch API pricing across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and DeepSeek. Learn when to use batch processing, implementation tips, and cost savings strategies.

item.title: LLM Pricing API: Get AI Model Costs as JSON
item.description: How to use the free LLM Pricing API to get current AI model costs as JSON. Quick start guide with JavaScript and Python examples for dashboards, CI/CD, and cost calculators.

item.title: Add AI to Your SaaS in 30 Minutes: Complete Integration Guide (2026)
item.description: Step-by-step guide to adding AI features to your SaaS app. Choose the right API, integrate in 30 minutes, and keep costs under $20/month. Real code examples for Node.js and Python.

item.title: Best AI APIs for Data Analysis 2026
item.description: Compare AI APIs for data analysis with real cost breakdowns for GPT-5, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Claude Sonnet 4, and DeepSeek V4 Pro. Monthly costs for 100, 1K, and 10K analysis tasks.
